questions.prompt: A user needs to host a video conference call. Which Linkus client should they use?
choices: Any of the three; they all host video conferences
questions.explanation: Video conferencing only hosts in Linkus Web. The Desktop client's video-conferencing button redirects you to the Web client. Mobile doesn't host video conferences at all (though it can join via the browser).

questions.prompt: The QR code in a Linkus welcome email can be scanned multiple times if the user has to re-install the app.
questions.explanation: QR codes (and login links) are single-use. If a user needs to log in again on a new device, the admin needs to send a fresh welcome email, or the user has to log in manually with credentials.
